mapper.select: SELECT SERNO AS serno, OPERTYPE AS operType, BNKING_ID AS bnkingId, CNFRM_NO AS cnfrmNo, TRIM(PUSH_SRVC_APPRVL_FLG) AS pushSrvcApprvlFlg, TRIM(BENEFIT_FLAG) AS benefitFlag, TRIM(FINANCE_FLAG) AS financeFlag, TRIM(WMLOUNGE_FLAG) AS wmloungeFlag, TRIM(IOTRANLIST_FLAG) AS iotranlistFlag, TRIM(NOTY_EXRATE_FLG) AS notyExrateFlg FROM TMB_OBJ_USR_MGT WHERE BNKING_ID = #{bnkingId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TMB_CAMP_CONTENTS ( CAMP_SEQ, TITLE, CNTS, WEB_URL, IMG_URL, STS_URL, POPUP_YN, STS_YN, CONTENTS_MSG ) VALUES ( #{campSeq}, #{title}, #{cnts}, #{webUrl}, #{imgUrl}, #{stsUrl}, #{popupYn}, #{stsYn}, #{contentsMsg} )
